item.name: Get listings of a collection

request.name: Get listings of a collection

query.description: The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0
The numbers of items to return, default 20, min 1, max 100
Filter listings that are less than this price
Filter listings that are more than this price

Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return listings that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".

Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return listings that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".
The field to sort the listings, default 'listPrice'
True to return aggregated marketplace listings, false to return just Magic Eden listings.
The direction returned elements should be sorted in, default 'asc'
Filter listings by the payment mint address that the seller expects. Default to filter for listings that only accept native SOL. Use "ALL" to show all listings.
Filter listings by the payment mint address that the seller expects. Default to filter for listings that only accept native SOL. Use "ALL" to show all listings.

response.name: success response

item.name: Get AMM pools corresponding to an owner or collection symbol. At least one of required collectionSymbol or owner is required!

request.name: Get AMM pools corresponding to an owner or collection symbol. At least one of required collectionSymbol or owner is required!

query.description: The collection symbol to query the pools from. At least this or "owner" must be passed in
The pools key to query by.
The pools key to query by.
The owner public key to query the pools created by. At least this or "collectionSymbol" must be passed in
The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0
The numbers of items to return, default 100, min 1, max 500

Sort pools by field. 0: NONE (no sorting field, default), 1: ADDRESS (sort pools by pool address), 2: SPOT_PRICE (sort pools by pool spot price), 5: BUYSIDE_ADJUSTED_PRICE (sort pools by buyside_adjusted_price = spot_price - royalty_fee - lp_fee)
Sort pools by field in specified directions. 0: NONE (no sorting direction, default to increasing order if field is specified), 1: DESC (descending), 2: INC (increasing)

response.name: success response

Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return tokens that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".

Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return tokens that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".
Determines what type of tokens to return, default both
The field to sort the tokens, default 'updatedAt'
The direction returned elements should be sorted in, default 'desc'

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Aggregated Magic Eden Solana NFT marketplace API covering collections, tokens, wallets, instructions (buy/sell/bid), MMM AMM pools, launchpad, and marketplace endpoints.
